purpose: The get-family accessors on a pristine module: get_rules and get_logic_program return None (not an empty collection), get_interpretation raises the no-program Exception, and get_time swallows that raise into 0 — the before-any-load equivalence class a rewrite initializing these globals differently would miss.
provenance: spine case against docs/surface.md fn:get_rules none + fn:get_logic_program before-reason + fn:get_interpretation no-program; screened at the pin 2026-07-07
